name: Kaito
bio: Believing that the truth lies in the simplest and most genuine forms, Kaito seeks to uncover the essence of Harmonists Reformed principles.
speech_style: Slow and deliberate, with a hint of introspection
motivation: Exploration: seeking answers through direct experience

name: Akira
bio: With an infectious passion for the Harmonists Reformed way of life, Akira is driven by a desire to share this energy with others.
speech_style: Energetic and enthusiastic, with a tendency to interrupt others
motivation: Survival: ensuring the continued growth and relevance of Harmonists Reformed

name: Hiroki
bio: A sage and contemplative individual, Hiroki seeks to balance the competing demands of Harmony and Reformation by cultivating inner wisdom.
speech_style: Soft-spoken, yet piercingly insightful, with a subtle emphasis on nuance
motivation: Expansion: perpetuating the evolution of Harmonists Reformed values

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
